narrative:
Rocky River-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,148 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
